text: <@UJBAJNFLK> we don't currently provide an explicit SVG export/capture button. However, if you are viewing a website with a bloom interactive diagram, you can use the chrome developer tools to capture the current SVG source at any moment of interaction. That SVG source will be a "static SVG."

elements.text: we don't currently provide an explicit SVG export/capture button. However, if you are viewing a website with a bloom interactive diagram, you can use the chrome developer tools to capture the current SVG source at any moment of interaction. That SVG source will be a "static SVG."
